title: SpaceX Dragon cargo capsule heads for home after historic ISS-boosting mission (video)
description: A SpaceX Dragon cargo capsule undocked from the International Space Station today (Feb. 26) after spending six months at the orbiting lab.
content: A SpaceX Dragon cargo capsule undocked from the International Space Station today (Feb. 26) after spending six months at the orbiting lab.
